# 3D Local

**Path:** `local_descriptor/handcrafted/3d`

Handcrafted local descriptors operating directly on 3D neighborhoods.

## Scope

**Include:** LRF-based; LRF-free 3D neighborhoods

**Exclude:** 2D projected patches
